valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Sat 13 Jun 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Sun 14 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low north of Faeroes 1000 losing its identity by midnight tonight. New low expected Iberia 1014 by same time. High Biscay 1028 dissipating
